VZ.name: Verizon
VZ.angle: Lead with savings and free line. Do NOT mention Verizon network unless the member brings it up first.
VZ.ifAsked: If they mention Verizon: "You'd be on the exact same network — but at a fraction of the cost."
VZ.compliance: Do not proactively say 'Verizon towers' or 'Verizon network' — only confirm if the member asks.

ATT.name: AT&T
ATT.angle: Consistent wired speeds — never deprioritized like AT&T Air or AT&T 5G. WiFi hotspot access AT&T doesn't offer. Save up to $1,500.

TMO.name: T-Mobile
TMO.angle: Consistent wired speeds — never deprioritized like T-Mobile 5G. WiFi hotspot access T-Mobile doesn't offer. 99.9% reliable network.
